title: August 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 2''' is the 214th day of the year (215th in leap years), with 151 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[James Howe]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Kevin Smith]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Simon Kinberg]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 26|''Star Wars Weekly'' 26]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Mark Klastorin]] dies.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: Vile Villains]]'' released.
*2016 – ''[[Chaos at the Castle]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 4|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 4]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 5|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 5]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 34|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 34]] published.
*2017 – "[[The Storms of Taul]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil]]'' published in paperback.
*2022 – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' published in paperback as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2022 – [[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (unabridged audiobook)|''Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – ''[[Death Troopers]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – ''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – [[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: The Krytos Trap'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 212|''Star Wars Insider'' 212]] published.
*[[2023]] – Episodes 8 - 13 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]'' premiered on Disney+.
*2023 – "[[The Girl and Her Gargantua / The Show Must Go On]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2023 – [[Dark Droids 1|''Dark Droids'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 7|''Hyperspace Stories'' 7]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 10|''Yoda'' 10]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures|Young Jedi Adventures]]'' [[Young Jedi Adventures Season Two|Season Two]] shorts premiered on Disney+.
